message:
test(session): cover re-initialization, state persistence, and lifecycle edges [bd-61u9]

Add 7 new tests to session.rs covering previously untested paths:
- Re-initialization overwrites client info, capabilities, and protocol version
- Session state persists through initialization call
- Notification stops after unsubscribe (subscribe→notify→unsubscribe→no-notify)
- Re-subscribe after unsubscribe works correctly
- Debug format shows initialized=true after init
- Non-default server capabilities accessible via accessor
- All LogLevel variants round-trip through set/get

Server tests: 1223 → 1230

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
